message:
ci: Add GitHub Actions quality workflow for automated code quality checks

This commit adds CI/CD infrastructure:

.github/workflows/quality.yml:
- Triggers on all pushes and pull requests
- Uses ubuntu-latest runner
- Workflow steps:
  1. Checkout with full history (fetch-depth: 0) for branch comparison
  2. Install uv via astral-sh/setup-uv@v3 with python-version-file
  3. Sync dependencies (cpu extra + dev) via uv sync
  4. Install UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner) from official installer
  5. Determine diff base (PR base sha or push before sha)
  6. Run quality gate on changed files via scripts/quality_gate.py

Quality gate enforcement:
- Ruff linting with auto-fix (fails if changes needed)
- Type checking via ty check (errors fail, warnings allowed)
- UBS resource-lifecycle category scanning

Dynamic base detection:
- For PRs: uses github.event.pull_request.base.sha
- For pushes: uses github.event.before
- Falls back to full repo scan if no usable base

This ensures all contributions pass linting, type checking, and static
analysis before merge, maintaining code quality across the project.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+name: quality
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+  push:
+
+jobs:
+  quality:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
+
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3
+        with:
+          python-version-file: .python-version
+
+      - name: Sync dependencies (cpu)
+        run: uv sync --extra cpu --dev
+
+      - name: Install UBS
+        run: |
+          curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/main/install.sh | bash
+          echo "$HOME/.local/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"
+
+      - name: Determine diff base
+        id: diff
+        run: |
+          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "pull_request" ]; then
+            echo "base=${{ github.event.pull_request.base.sha }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          else
+            echo "base=${{ github.event.before }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Quality gate (changed files)
+        run: |
+          BASE="${{ steps.diff.outputs.base }}"
+          if [ -z "$BASE" ] || [ "$BASE" = "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" ]; then
+            echo "No usable base sha; running gate on whole repo."
+            uv run python -m scripts.quality_gate --mode all
+          else
+            uv run python -m scripts.quality_gate --mode branch --base "$BASE" --head "${{ github.sha }}"
+          fi
+
